scenarios.name: happy_path_multiple_pages_with_blocks
scenarios.given: Notion search returns 2 pages, each with 3 child blocks
scenarios.when: resource is executed without page_ids filter
scenarios.then: 2 block lists are yielded, each containing 3 blocks

scenarios.name: empty_search_response
scenarios.then: no blocks are yielded and no exception is raised

scenarios.name: page_with_zero_blocks
scenarios.given: Notion search returns 1 page with zero child blocks
scenarios.then: no blocks are yielded because the if blocks: guard prevents empty yields

scenarios.name: page_ids_filter_matches
scenarios.given: Notion search returns 3 pages but page_ids=['page-1'] is provided
scenarios.when: resource is executed with page_ids filter
scenarios.then: only the blocks from page-1 are yielded

scenarios.name: page_ids_filter_no_match
scenarios.given: Notion search returns 2 pages but page_ids=['non-existent-id'] is provided
scenarios.when: resource is executed with page_ids filter

scenarios.name: mixed_pages_with_and_without_blocks
scenarios.given: Notion search returns 3 pages: page-1 has 2 blocks, page-2 has 0 blocks, page-3 has 1 block
scenarios.then: 2 block lists are yielded (page-1 and page-3), page-2 is skipped due to empty blocks
